scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.android: pwsh.exe -NoLogo -Command "npm --prefix frontend run build && Set-Location frontend && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android"
scripts.android:run: pwsh.exe -NoLogo -Command "npm --prefix frontend run build && Set-Location frontend && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
